caption: A video presents gameplay from "MADDEN NFL 23," specifically focusing on the "ULTIMATE TEAM" mode. The initial sequence shows a player card for a cornerback, "ANTONIO CROMARTIE," with an overall rating of "95" and various attribute scores like "95" and "94." A logo for "MADDEN NFL 23" is visible in the bottom left. The scene then transitions to a "TOP OFFENSE" menu dated "DECEMBER 23RD," which displays a roster of player cards arranged by position. Positions listed include "LT," "LG," "C," "RG," "RT," "TE," "WR1," "HB," "QB," "FB," and "SLOT WR." Several cards feature specific ratings, such as a "73," "66," "63," and "72." The focus shifts to highlight the "QB" position, showing a card for "JOHN ELWAY," followed by the "FB" position with a card rated "72," and finally the "SLOT WR" position. The "MADDEN NFL 23" and "MUT.GG" logos remain visible.
